---
title: "Variant classification"
output: rmarkdown::html_document
---

```{r synopsis, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat(cpsr::variant_classification_synopsis_doc_note(quarto = FALSE))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

i <- 1
j <- 1
cat("| Tag | Description |\n|-------|-------------|\n")
while(i <= NROW(cpsr::acmg$evidence_codes)){
  ev <- cpsr::acmg$evidence_codes[i,]
  ## ACMG_BS2_* not implemented in CPSR
  if(!startsWith(ev$cpsr_evidence_code,"ACMG_BS2_")){
    line <- glue::glue(
      "| {j}. `{ev$cpsr_evidence_code}` (**{ev$path_score}**) | ",
      "{ev$description} |")
    cat(line,"\n")
    j <- j + 1
  }
  i <- i + 1
}


```

## Calibration of classification thresholds

```{r thresholds_intro, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat(cpsr::classification_thresholds_intro_doc_note())
```

```{r classification_plot, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("../man/figures/CPSR_classification_score_thresholds.png")
```

The following thresholds are currently used to assign classifications based on
pathogenicity scores:

`r knitr::kable(cpsr::acmg[['score2tier']])`

```{r thresholds_outro, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cat(cpsr::classification_thresholds_outro_doc_note())
```
